Hero.headline: Control your money
Hero.subheadline: Fintia helps you record, visualize and automate your personal finances in one place. Simple, visual and designed for you.

Problem.label: The problem
Problem.title: Managing your finances shouldn't be
Problem.description: If you've ever felt frustrated with your personal finances, you're not alone. These are the most common problems.
Problem.p1desc: Many people don't know exactly what they spend on. At the end of the month, the money simply disappears without explanation.
Problem.p2desc: Writing down every expense, categorizing transactions and keeping spreadsheets updated takes time and energy you don't have.
Problem.p3desc: Most financial tools are designed for experts. They have too many features you'll never use.

Solution.label: The solution
Solution.title: Meet
Solution.description: A personal finance tool you'll actually want to use. No complicated financial jargon, no unnecessary features. Just clarity about your money.
Solution.f1desc: Clean interface without overwhelming options. Just what you need.
Solution.f2desc: Clear charts that show your financial situation at a glance.
Solution.f3desc: Sync your accounts and forget about tedious manual tracking.
Solution.f4desc: Designed for real people, not expert accountants.

Features.label: Features
Features.title: Everything you need to control your money
Features.description: From basic tracking to full automation. Choose the plan that fits you best.
Features.freeDesc: Perfect to start organizing your finances
Features.premiumDesc: Full automation and advanced control of your finances
Features.f1desc: Add your expenses quickly and easily with just a few taps.
Features.f2desc: Review your expense history organized by date and category.
Features.f3desc: Visualize your finances with clear, easy-to-understand charts.
Features.p1desc: Connect your accounts and cards to import transactions automatically.
Features.p2desc: Set spending limits for each category and monitor your progress.
Features.p3desc: Get notified when you're approaching your budget limits.
Features.p4desc: Get advanced analytics and personalized recommendations to save more.

HowItWorks.label: How it works
HowItWorks.title: Get started in 3 simple steps
HowItWorks.description: You don't need to be a finance expert. Fintia does the heavy lifting for you.
HowItWorks.s1desc: Create your account in seconds. No credit card, no commitments. Just your email and a password.
HowItWorks.s2desc: Add your expenses manually or connect your bank accounts to import transactions automatically.
HowItWorks.s3desc: Visualize your finances, get budget alerts and make informed decisions about your money.
HowItWorks.ctaDesc: Join thousands of users already controlling their finances with Fintia.

Pricing.label: Pricing
Pricing.title: Simple and transparent
Pricing.description: Start free and upgrade when you need. No surprises, no hidden costs.

free.name: Free
free.description: All the basics to start organizing your finances.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: Full automation and control to optimize your money.

Pricing.guaranteeDesc: If you're not happy with Premium, we'll refund you within the first 30 days. No questions asked.

CTA.title: Start taking control of your money today
CTA.description: Join thousands of people already simplifying their personal finances. No complications, no commitments.

Footer.description: Simplify your personal finances. Record, visualize and automate your money in one place.
